description: The Pursuit fragrance for men by dunhill is signature Dunhill sophisticatioin, right from its warm colour to the irreverant flask. Pursuit opens with pineapple leaf, green accords, yuzu, bergamot, orange leaf and mandarin, with middle notes of amber, lavender, cinnamon, pepper and cardamom. The base has musk, cedar, warm sandalwood, vetiver, amber and incense.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
